subcodes.first_line: O Aqa Kuchik! It is hoped that divine grace may take hold of thee and His bounty encompass thee in such wise that thy station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا آقا کوچک امید آنکه فضل الهی اخذت نماید و عنایتش احاطه فرماید بشانی که مقام
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
